data.title: A whale sold 67,006 HYPE tokens worth $3.82 million
data.description: According to Lookonchainchain monitoring, a whale sold 67,006 HYPE tokens worth $3.82 million. This whale previously purchased 1.26 million HYPE tokens at an average price of $7.52 (costing $9.51 million) and received 22,270 HYPE tokens at genesis. To date, this address has sold a total of 385,513 HYPE tokens, generating $16.15 million at an average price of $41.9. This whale currently holds 900,663 HYPE tokens, valued at approximately $50.5 million, for a total profit exceeding $57 million.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury firm Smarter Web Company plans to seek inclusion in the FTSE 100 index and explore potential acquisitions
data.description: Andrew Webley, CEO of UK Bitcoin treasury company Smarter Web Company, said the company is considering acquiring struggling competitors to expand its fund. Smarter Web Company is the UK's largest Bitcoin treasury company, currently holding 2,470 Bitcoins, worth nearly $275 million. Andrew Webley also expressed his desire to seek inclusion in the FTSE 100 index, an index of the top 100 listed companies in the UK. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin "sharks" have begun buying on dips, increasing their holdings by over 65,000 BTC in the past seven days
data.description: On-chain analysis platform CryptoQuant recently released research showing that Bitcoin "sharks" are buying on dips. The community generally refers to Bitcoin wallets with balances between 100 BTC and 1,000 BTC as "sharks." Data shows that shark addresses have added more than 65,000 BTC in the past week, bringing their total holdings to a record 3.65 million Bitcoins. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Cango mined 141.1 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 5,418.2.
data.description: Cango, a Bitcoin mining company listed on the New York Stock Exchange, announced on the X platform that it mined 141.1 Bitcoins this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 5,418.2.

data.title: Binance HODLer Airdrop Launches Boundless (ZKC)
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance has launched Boundless (ZKC) as part of its HODLer airdrop. Users who subscribe to guaranteed principal earning (fixed and/or demand) or on-chain earning products using BNB between 08:00 on September 2, 2025, and 07:59 on September 6, 2025 (GMT+8), will receive the airdrop. HODLer airdrop information is expected to be available within 24 hours, and the new tokens will be distributed to users' spot wallets at least one hour before trading begins. Binance will list ZKC at 20:00 on September 15, 2025 (GMT+8), and will open trading pairs against USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY. Seed tag trading rules apply. ZKC deposits will open at 20:00 on September 12, 2025 (GMT+8).

data.title: Binance Discloses ZKC HODLer Airdrop Details: Total Airdrop Tokens Account for 1.5% of the Genesis Token Supply
data.description: According to the Binance announcement, the total supply of Boundless (ZKC) genesis tokens is 1,000,000,000, with an unlimited maximum supply (annual inflation rate of 7% in the first year, gradually decreasing to 3% from the eighth year onwards). The total HODLer airdrop tokens are 15,000,000 ZKC (1.50% of the total genesis token supply). An additional 5,000,000 ZKC will be used for marketing activities after spot listing, and another 15,000,000 ZKC will be used for marketing activities six months after listing. Detailed rules will be announced separately. The circulating supply at the time of Binance listing is 200,937,056 ZKC (20.09% of the total genesis token supply).

data.title: Binance and Cristiano Ronaldo Launch 'Know Your Cristiano' Campaign
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, introducing the 'Know Your Cristiano' campaign in collaboration with football icon Cristiano Ronaldo. This initiative aims to inspire fans to complete the Know Your Customer (KYC) process, drawing parallels between the verification process and the world of football. The campaign emphasizes the importance of identity verification in the Web3 space, likening it to knowing Cristiano Ronaldo's iconic name and number, which symbolizes being an official part of the team.

The 'Know Your Cristiano' campaign uses football analogies to make the concept of KYC relatable. Just as jersey numbers, debut matches, team trust, and trophies are integral to a footballer's journey, KYC is essential for users to fully engage with the Web3 ecosystem. Without KYC, users remain on the sidelines, unable to access the full range of rewards and experiences offered by Binance. The campaign underscores that KYC is akin to having your name on the back of a jersey, making your participation official and unlocking the full potential of the Binance platform.

KYC is crucial in maintaining the integrity and security of the Web3 environment, much like referees and rules ensure fair play in football. It establishes identity, builds trust within the community, and grants access to exclusive rewards and campaigns. The article highlights that while users can explore Web3 without KYC, the true experience begins only after verification. Completing KYC is portrayed as stepping out of the stands and into the game, allowing users to join the 'Starting XI' and fully participate in the Binance ecosystem.

The campaign encourages users to register on Binance, complete their KYC, and unlock various rewards, including participation in CR7 campaigns. By drawing parallels between football and the digital world, Binance and Cristiano Ronaldo aim to make the KYC process more engaging and relatable for fans. The article concludes by inviting users to become part of the Binance community, emphasizing the importance of verification in accessing the full range of opportunities in the Web3 space.

data.title: Brazilian Firm Meliuz Adopts Low-Risk Strategy to Increase Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to PANews, Brazilian publicly traded company Meliuz has unveiled a new strategy aimed at increasing its Bitcoin holdings through low-risk methods. The company plans to implement an options-based strategy to leverage Bitcoin price fluctuations and expand its current reserve of over 600 Bitcoins.

Local media reports indicate that Meliuz intends to sell put options with specific strike prices. For instance, by selling options contracts with a strike price of $95,000, the company can earn option fees if Bitcoin's price exceeds this level at expiration. To manage risk, these options are backed by less than 10% of the company's operating cash reserves.

Meliuz has also stated that this innovative strategy is supported by "professional partners" in the trading sector, although the names of these institutions have not been disclosed.

data.title: Data: 14 entities establishing SOL treasury reserves hold over 10 million SOL tokens, with Galaxy ranking fourth.
data.description: Data from the Strategic SOL Reserve shows that 14 entities have established SOL treasury reserves, holding a total of 10.267 million SOL tokens, valued at $2.39 billion, representing 1.79% of the current total SOL supply. Of this, approximately 585,059 SOL tokens are staked, valued at $104.1 million, with an average staking yield of 6.86%, representing 0.102% of the total supply. The entities with the largest holdings are as follows: 1. Sharps Technology (STSS) ranks first, currently holding 2.14 million SOL, worth approximately US$498.3 million; 2. DFDVUpexi (UPXI) ranks second, currently holding 2.028 million SOL, worth approximately US$472.2 million; 3. Upxi ranks third, currently holding 2 million SOL, worth approximately US$465 million; 4. Galaxy ranks fourth, currently holding 1.35 million SOL, worth approximately US$314.3 million; 5. Mercurity Fintech ranks fifth, currently holding 1.083 million SOL, worth approximately US$252.3 million.

data.title: A market maker exchanged 1.52 million HOLO for 1,013 BNB 20 hours ago.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a market maker exchanged 1.52 million HOLO for 1,013 BNB 20 hours ago. This move was made when HOLO was trading at a 15% premium on the BNB Chain, possibly to stabilize the price.

data.title: Paxos Labs co-founders publish a statement suggesting they will accept the USDH bidding results: they hope to participate and understand the demand for stablecoins in the HyperLiquid ecosystem.
data.description: Paxos Labs co-founder bhau posted on the X platform, seemingly accepting the USDH bid results and thanking the community for their support. He stated that when he initially proposed USDH, his goal was to directly engage with and understand the Hyperliquid community's needs for a stablecoin. Over the past week, he has deepened his understanding of what truly matters. While the proposal is currently locked, this is just the beginning of an ongoing dialogue. Paxos will continue to be a contributor to the ecosystem, aiming not only to win governance votes but also to expand the ecosystem. According to a Paxos official Twitter account posted on the X platform, validator voting for the USDH proposal may have concluded, with re-staking open until this Sunday. The latest USDH bidding data shows Native Markets currently holds 70.31% of the staked share, with Paxos Labs in second place at 16.79%.

data.title: Bitcoin Sharks Increase Holdings Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Bitcoin 'shark' wallets have significantly increased their holdings, acquiring 65,000 BTC in just one week as the cryptocurrency's price rebounds from recent lows. This activity highlights a strategic move by these large holders, who possess between 100 and 1,000 BTC, to capitalize on lower prices. Data from CryptoQuant reveals that these 'sharks' have expanded their market exposure by adding 65,000 BTC, bringing their total holdings to a record 3.65 million BTC. This buying spree occurs despite Bitcoin's spot prices hovering around $112,000, indicating a disconnect between retail-driven volatility and deeper structural demand.

The recent market dynamics underscore a divide between short-term traders and larger, conviction-driven buyers. Short-term holders (STHs), who typically hold Bitcoin for six months or less, have seen their spent output profit ratio (SOPR) begin to turn positive after a period of losses. This shift suggests a potential change in market sentiment among these speculative traders. Meanwhile, declining exchange balances point to increased buyer demand, as net outflows indicate that investors are moving their coins into cold storage rather than keeping them liquid for trading. While further price corrections are possible, the underlying market structure appears robust, laying the groundwork for Bitcoin's next upward movement.

Despite these developments, the situation remains precarious for some Bitcoin investor groups. As previously reported by Cointelegraph, whales and long-term holders have mirrored the selling patterns seen during the 2022 bear market, particularly throughout August. CryptoQuant data shows that long-term holder (LTH) wallet balances have yet to recover, with the rolling 30-day balance change still in negative territory. This ongoing trend suggests that while some investors are accumulating, others remain cautious, reflecting the complex dynamics at play in the current Bitcoin market. Readers are reminded that this article does not offer investment advice, and all trading decisions should be made based on individual research and risk assessment.

data.title: Binance Launches Boundless (ZKC) via HODLer Airdrops, Trading to Open Sept. 15
data.description: Key TakeawaysBinance introduces Boundless (ZKC) as the 39th project on its HODLer Airdrops page.15 million ZKC (1.5% of genesis supply) allocated to eligible BNB Simple Earn and On-Chain Yields subscribers.Trading starts Sept. 15, 2025 at 14:00 UTC, with ZKC listed against USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY.Circulating supply at listing: 200.9 million ZKC (20.09% of genesis).Airdrop DetailsBinance has announced Boundless (ZKC), a universal zero-knowledge (ZK) protocol designed to make blockchains internet-scale, as the latest project to feature on its HODLer Airdrops program.Eligible users who subscribed BNB to Simple Earn (Flexible and/or Locked) and/or On-Chain Yields products between Sept. 2, 2025 (00:00 UTC) and Sept. 5, 2025 (23:59 UTC) will receive part of the 15 million ZKC airdrop pool.Distributions will appear in users’ Spot Accounts at least 1 hour before trading begins.Trading TimelineDeposits Open: Sept. 12, 2025 at 12:00 UTCSpot Trading Launch: Sept. 15, 2025 at 14:00 UTCPairs: ZKC/USDT, ZKC/USDC, ZKC/BNB, ZKC/FDUSD, ZKC/TRYSeed Tag: Applied to ZKC at listingWhile ZKC will be available on Binance Alpha before spot trading opens, it will no longer be showcased there once trading is live on the main exchange.TokenomicsGenesis Supply: 1,000,000,000 ZKCMax Supply: Infinite (7% annual inflation in Year 1, tapering to 3% from Year 8 onward)HODLer Airdrop Allocation: 15,000,000 ZKCMarketing Allocations: 5,000,000 ZKC post-listing + 15,000,000 ZKC six months laterCirculating Supply at Listing: 200,937,056 ZKC (20.09%)Smart Contract Addresses:BNB Smart Chain: 0x15247e6E23D3923a853cCf15940A20CCdf16e94aEthereum: 0x000006c2A22ff4A44ff1f5d0F2ed65F781F55555Research Report & Listing FeeA detailed research report on Boundless (ZKC) will be published within 48 hours. Binance confirmed the listing fee is 0.BNB holding hard cap applies:> User’s Average BNB Holding / Total Average BNB Holding × 100% ≤ 4% (if above 4%, capped at 4%).
